name: Triage skip path (no live external services)
description: Validates that when no candidate clears the score>=70 + novelty bar, Triage writes chosen_release=null + skip_reason via write_state_json, and Topic Gate early-exits without firing Telegram. Maps to playbook scenario (b) low-significance release filtered at Triage. Runs against live ArXiv but does NOT require Telegram, GCS, GitHub, Imagen, or Veo.

parts.text: Trigger one polling cycle. Stop at Triage if nothing clears the bar.
